mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysMgrErrDAO.countSysErr 설명 : 시스템 오류현황 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : SysMgrErrDAO.listSysErrPaging 설명 : 시스템 오류현황 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : SysMgrErrDAO.listSysErr 설명 : 시스템 오류현황 목록 조회 */

/* SQL ID : SysMgrErrDAO.selectSysErrDtl 설명 : 시스템 오류현황 상세 조회 */ WITH PATH_SPLIT AS ( SELECT A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID , M.MENU_ID , M.MENUNM , M.MENU_PATH , LEVEL AS "PATH_LEVEL" , TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(M.MENU_PATH, '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS "PATH_MENU_ID" FROM TB_LMS_SYS_ERR_MSG A JOIN TB_LMS_MENU M ON A.SYS_ERR_PAGENM = M.MENU_URL WHERE A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID = #{sysErrMsgId} CONNECT BY LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(M.MENU_PATH, '\|') AND PRIOR M.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID AND PRIOR A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID = A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL ) , LOCATION AS (SELECT PS.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID , LISTAGG(PM.MENUNM, ' > ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PS.PATH_LEVEL) AS "LOCATION_PATH" FROM PATH_SPLIT PS LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MENU PM ON PS.PATH_MENU_ID = PM.MENU_ID WHERE PS.PATH_MENU_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PS.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID ) SELECT L.LOCATION_PATH AS "ERR_LOCATION" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , 'YYYY.MM.DD (HH24:MI:SS)') AS "REG_DTTM" , '[' || A.SYS_ERR_MSG_TYCD || '] ' || B.CDNM AS "ERR_TYPE" , A.SYS_ERR_MSG_CTS AS "SYS_ERR_MSG_CTS" FROM TB_LMS_SYS_ERR_MSG A JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD B ON A.SYS_ERR_MSG_TYCD = B.CD JOIN TB_LMS_MENU C ON A.SYS_ERR_PAGENM = C.MENU_URL LEFT JOIN LOCATION L ON A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID = L.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID WHERE A.SYS_ERR_MSG_ID = #{sysErrMsgId}
